    1. Home
    2. For Communities
    3. Questionnaire: The Basics

    Listing Questionnaire: The Basics

    About 5-10 minutes. Fill in what you can and skip anything that doesn’t apply or that you’d rather not publish - partial answers are welcome, and you can come back to any section later. Your answers are sent privately to our editors; nothing is published until we’ve verified you with your community.

    About you & your community

    So we can verify you before anything is published - nothing you submit appears on the site until we've confirmed you with your community. How verification works.

    Who should press send: anyone on your team can gather these answers - your chef knows the dining program better than anyone. But the submitter's name and title are published on your listing, and families give the most weight to a profile submitted by leadership. We recommend having your Executive Director (or another member of executive staff) review the answers and make the final submission.

    The community

    Independent, family-owned, non-profit, or part of an organization - and which one?

    Month/year your current Executive Director or management group began. Families weigh this - a community can change a lot under new leadership, for better or worse.

    Capacity & rooms
    Building & grounds

    Courtyard, gardens, walking paths, secured outdoor area for memory care?

    Staffing

    Families ask this constantly.

    Is a nurse on site 24/7, on site during business hours, or on call? RN or LPN?

    Before you send: our content guidelines - the short version: describe what you do, specifically and honestly; no incident details, no comparisons to other communities. We may edit for clarity and guidelines, and we'll show you everything before it's published.

    Your answers go privately to our editors by email - nothing is published until we've verified you and prepared your listing with you. Partial answers are welcome; skip anything that doesn't apply, and you can return to any section later. See our Privacy Policy. Prefer email? Send numbered answers to listings@senior.living.community instead.

    When you’re ready for the next section: Care & services →

    Senior Living Community is an independent information resource for families. We are not a referral service and do not provide medical, legal, or financial advice - for decisions about care, consult the professionals involved. Facility details change; always confirm directly with a community. Listings are never paid placements. Last data review: 2026-07-11. Run a senior living community? Claim your free listing or see our marketing services for communities. Terms · Privacy.
